Seraphism: The additional effect has been revamped to remove status afflictions that can be removed by Purify from self and nearby party members or create a barrier to nullify the next applicable status affliction.

new_content.name: Recollection (Extreme)
new_content.description: An extreme version of the new trial.

new_content.name: AAC Cruiserweight Tier (Savage)
new_content.description: A savage version of the new raid dungeon.

new_content.name: The Arcadion: Souls under Siege
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: Duty Roulette: Level Cap Dungeons
new_content.description: A new category added to the Duty Finder.

new_content.name: Allagan tomestones of mathematics
new_content.description: New currency introduced in the patch.

new_content.description: Graphical adjustments to player character models and shadow quality.

housing.name: Herringbone Interior Wall
housing.description: An interior wall perfect for those who can't decide which diagonal they prefer.

housing.name: Teal Carpet
housing.description: Durable-yet-fuzzy loop carpet in a rich blue-green.

housing.name: Fluorescent Tube Chandelier
housing.description: Elegant meets mundane in this tasteful ceiling decoration that emits wholly practical light.

housing.name: East End Tree
housing.description: This specimen transplanted from a disputed forest lends a touch of ennui to any lawn.

housing.name: Hewn Stone Circle
housing.description: Rocks carefully placed for purposes of aesthetics, social gatherings, or potentially arcane rituals.

housing.name: Hedge-trimmed Flower Bed
housing.description: A circular hedge tenderly blossoming and primly kept.

housing.name: Chocobo Chick Fountain
housing.description: Darling yellow birds float whimsically in this tiered fountain, providing decoration for the garden and succor for the soul.

housing.name: Gardener's Gate
housing.description: Four out of five gardeners agree that this gate is, in design and practicality, perfect for any garden.

housing.name: No-entry Door Partition
housing.description: If there was any doubt as to whether or not you can enter this false entryway, the answer is no.

housing.name: Vault Rib
housing.description: A sloping arch towards the ceiling guaranteed to impress the architecturally inclined.

housing.name: Blank Minimalist Partition
housing.description: A simple partition that may yet be freed from its simplicity by adornments.

housing.name: Minimalist Partition Door
housing.description: A simple partition affixed with a single door. Just one.

housing.name: Hingan Dresser
housing.description: A wooden dresser designed in the Far Eastern style.

housing.name: Hingan Event Partition
housing.description: A partition of Far Eastern design traditionally used for festivities.

housing.name: Simple Hingan Pillar
housing.description: A decorative pillar fit for alcoves typically seen in traditional Far Eastern homes.

housing.name: Wooden Frame Partition
housing.description: This elegant arched partition allows for conversation, if not passage, between the two sides.

housing.name: Lattice-windowed Cabinet
housing.description: For when you desire an obstructed view of the contents of your cupboard.

housing.name: Mantelshelf
housing.description: A tiered shelf whereupon you may display your most treasured possessions.

housing.name: Hingan Floor Cabinet
housing.description: Floor storage fit for alcoves typically seen in traditional Far Eastern homes.

housing.name: Dark Knight Display Crystal
